title: Conflict Check Agent
shortDescription: Scans every new matter against your firm's full conflicts database and ethical walls before you commit.

workflow.label: Scan firm records
workflow.detail: Active matters, closed files, prior adverse

workflow.label: Recommendation ready
workflow.detail: Clear / waivable / decline, for your call

seo.title: AI Conflict Check Agent for Law Firms | Dodonai
seo.description: Scan new matters against your firm's full conflicts database, related-party detection included, with a logged audit trail that satisfies Model Rule 1.7.

hero.headline: AI Conflict Check Agent
hero.subheadline: Scan every new matter against your firm's conflicts database and ethical walls before you commit. A second set of eyes that never forgets a name.
bullets: Full-text search across prior matters, not just party names
Related-party detection for spouses, co-counsel, and affiliated entities
Ethical walls enforced across practice groups and attorneys
Logged audit trail for every check

scenario.heading: The conflict you would have missed
paragraphs: You take a commercial breach-of-contract case. Your practice management system says no conflict. 4 months in, a deposition reveals the defendant's spouse was a witness in a matter your partner handled 3 years ago. The Conflict Check agent would have caught that. It searches full text across every matter, note, and document in your system, not just the party-name field, and surfaces matches with context you can review in a minute.

whatItDoes.heading: What the Conflict Check agent does
bullets: Scans the inbound matter facts (names, addresses, entities, counsel) against your full conflicts database, including matter notes and attached documents
Runs related-party detection for spouses, co-counsel, parent and subsidiary entities, and common beneficial owners
Enforces ethical walls you've set up between practice groups or specific attorneys
Produces a conflict memo with the matching records surfaced and a clear recommended disposition
Logs every check in an audit trail that supports Model Rule 1.7 and state-bar conflict-checking requirements

integrations: Clio, MyCase, Practice Panther, or SmokeBall
Your document management system (NetDocuments, iManage, Clio Drive)
Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace for the document layer
Slack or email for escalation notifications

safety.heading: Safety posture
paragraphs: The agent flags, you decide. The output is a memo with matching records surfaced; the call to take or decline the matter stays with the attorney of record.

faq.question: Does it replace our current conflict-check process?
faq.answer: It runs alongside it. Your existing Clio or PMS check stays in place as the system of record. The agent adds a full-text, related-party layer on top and flags anything the field-level check might have missed.

faq.question: How do you handle client confidentiality during the check?
faq.answer: The agent reads only matters your firm already has access to. It runs in your account, under your security controls, and nothing is stored outside your system or used to train models.
